browserVerification.result: The in-app WebGL preview displays the V-shaped 24-segment wire, reports 0 mesh vertices / 0 faces / 3 curve points, and logs no browser warning or error.

note: The optional line payload is display-only. It preserves the evaluated curve as a Blender-style editable viewport wire without adding its endpoints to TriSoup mesh vertex or face statistics. The supplied offline Blender render is blank because the raw curve has no beveled surface.
